caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the front, and a gold chain necklace sits in a podcast studio. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background features a white wall with a repeating logo that reads "HUSTLE" above three stars. To his right is a sign that reads "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics include a logo in the lower-left and lower-right corners that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing with his right hand. His hand is open and active in the initial moments, but as the sequence progresses, he settles his posture and focuses his gaze slightly to the side, continuing to talk into the microphone.
